home.pageTitle: alviKRON — KRON Family Primary Memecoin | Fair Launch on Base
home.eyebrow: KRON Family · Fair Launch · Base Network
home.subtitle: De meme-toegangspoort tot de KRON Family en het bredere TVK / SOVRA / EnteleKron-universum.
home.lead: alviKRON is de primaire KRON Family memecoin — een experimenteel community-ingangspunt gebouwd op cultuur, memes en transparante fair-launch mechanismen. Geen investeringsbeloften.
home.warning: alviKRON is een experimentele memecoin met hoog risico. Geen gegarandeerde prijs, liquiditeit, notering, nut of rendement. Alleen ter informatie — geen financieel advies.
home.statusDesc: Official contract live on Base. Full address registry published on-chain and on the verification page.
home.aboutDesc1: alviKRON is een aparte KRON Family memecoin. EnteleKron is soevereine infrastructuur. Verbonden door het merk — niet hetzelfde asset of protocol.
home.aboutDesc2: Een speels, speculatief digitaal cultuurasset met hoge volatiliteit en geen gegarandeerde toekomstige waarde. Meme eerst — nut later, zonder belofte.
home.launchTitle: Twee sporen. Eén regel voor memes.
home.launchDesc: Infrastructuurtokens financieren product via gestructureerde fondsenwerving. KRON Family memecoins lanceren fair — altijd. De beslissing van de maker voor het hele ecosysteem.
home.railInfraDesc: Soevereine infrastructuur, AI en ecosysteemlagen. Presales financieren labs, protocolwerk en serieuze ontwikkeling.
home.railCultureDesc: Alle 7 KRON-tokens: geen presale, geen privéverkoop, on-chain vergrendelingen, standaard tokenomics. Cultuur bouwt community.
home.tokenDesc: Beschrijvende informatie. Kan evolueren met deployment, verificatie, liquiditeit en juridische documentatie.
home.tokenAntiDump: Anti-dump: 14 dagen kennisgeving vóór verkoop van vergrendelde toewijzingen · max 10% per gebeurtenis. Volledig adresregister · Fair Launch Standaard
home.onchainTitle: Elk officieel adres. Op één plek.
home.onchainDesc: Contract and allocation wallets for alviKRON on Base. Click BaseScan to verify balances and transfers. Copy addresses only from this page.
home.familyDesc: Gefaseerde uitrol — alviKRON eerst, thematische satellieten, dan vraaggestuurde spin-offs. Nooit presale. Nooit een gebundelde familieverkoop.
home.progDesc: Het KRON Fair Launch Program is open-source Solidity op Base. Deploy elke KRON Family token met standaard 80/10/5/5-verdeling en onveranderlijke timelocks — geen presale-logica, ooit.
home.riskDesc: alviKRON is experimenteel, speculatief en riskant. Geen nut, markt, liquiditeit, notering of herstelbare waarde is gegarandeerd.
home.appTitle: Get the alviKRON holder app at app.alvikron.com
home.appDesc: Install the community portal on your phone — connect your wallet on Base, view your AKRON balance, and verify official addresses from a home-screen icon. Works today via Add to Home Screen.
home.appIosDesc: Safari → app.alvikron.com → Share → Add to Home Screen
home.appAndroidDesc: Chrome → app.alvikron.com → menu → Install app or Add to Home screen
home.appDesktopDesc: Chrome or Edge → install icon in the address bar, or bookmark app.alvikron.com
home.appNote: Fair-launch holder portal only — no presale, no KYC, no investor dashboard. For infrastructure presales see entelekron.io and sovraprotocol.com.

verify.title: Verifieer voordat u verstuurt.
verify.lead: Official alviKRON is live on Base. Only trust addresses in this registry and announcements on alvikron.com.
verify.deprecated: Verouderd V1 — niet gebruiken: TBD (verkeerde on-chain naam eKron). V1 bekijken op BaseScan
verify.policyDesc: Verkoop van vergrendelde toewijzingen vereist 14 dagen openbare kennisgeving en max 10% per verkoopgebeurtenis. Zie de KRON Fair Launch Standard. Toewijzingen staan vandaag in standaard wallets; on-chain timelock-contracten zijn gepland voor toekomstige KRON Family-lanceringen via het Lanceringsprogramma.
verify.queuedBanner: Deployment queued: Contract and wallet addresses are TBD until alviKRON fair launch on Base. Verify the primary gateway at www.ekron.network/verify.
verify.symbolBanner: On-chain symbol: BaseScan lists the ERC-20 ticker as AKRON (name: alviKRON). Verify the contract address — not the symbol alone.

faq.a1: No. alviKRON and all KRON Family memecoins follow the KRON Fair Launch Standard — no presale and no private sale, ever. Infrastructure tokens (ENK, SOVRA, ENM) may use structured raises; memecoins do not.
faq.a2: Seven independent experimental memecoins sharing a brand universe: alviKRON, soviKRON, mineKRON, alviKRON, puriKRON, puppyKRON, and warpKRON. Each has its own contract and risk profile. See the full roster.
faq.q3: Is alviKRON the same as EnteleKron?
faq.a3: No. alviKRON is a memecoin. EnteleKron is sovereign infrastructure. Names are connected by brand family — they are not the same asset or protocol.
faq.a4: Every KRON memecoin: 10B fixed supply, 80% fair-launch LP, 10% ecosystem (12-month lock), 5% founder (6-month lock), 5% founder (12-month lock). Enforced by on-chain timelocks via the launch program.
faq.q5: How do I verify the official contract?
faq.a5: Only trust addresses on the official verification page and announcements from official domains. If it is not verified there, assume it is not official.
faq.q6: When will other KRON tokens launch?
faq.a6: alviKRON deployed on Base on 15 Dec 2025 via fair launch. Other Phase II satellites (soviKRON, mineKRON) launch staggered after eKRON credibility. No timeline guarantees for siblings.
faq.a7: alviKRON is deployed on Base (EVM), chain ID 8453. The official contract is on BaseScan. Always confirm you are on Base before interacting.
faq.q8: What is the official alviKRON contract address?
faq.a8: The official contract is published on the verification page: 0xC10C8e1a6223cCBF60a8884654733D6cf9DCBA12. On-chain symbol: AKRON.
faq.q9: How do I contact the alviKRON team?
faq.a9: Official project email: team@alvikron.com. Only trust communications from official domains (alvikron.com) and verified channels.
faq.q10: Is alviKRON financial advice or an investment?
faq.a10: No. alviKRON is an experimental memecoin for culture and community. This website is informational only — not financial, legal, or tax advice. You may lose all funds. DYOR.
faq.q11: How do I get the alviKRON community app?
faq.a11: Open app.alvikron.com on your phone and add it to your home screen (Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen on iPhone; Chrome → Install app on Android). Connect a wallet on Base to view AKRON balance and verify official addresses — no presale or KYC.

consent.title: Legal Notice & Cookie Consent
consent.intro: alviKRON is a high-risk experimental memecoin. This website is informational only — not financial, legal, or tax advice. You must accept all policies below to access the homepage.
consent.cookiesDesc: We use essential functional storage (language preference, consent record). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are deployed by this site.
consent.policiesDesc: By clicking Accept, you agree to all of the following:
consent.responsibilityDesc: You confirm that you understand alviKRON may lose all value, that you alone verify contract addresses and transactions, that you accept full responsibility for wallet security, and that you comply with all applicable laws and taxes in your jurisdiction.
consent.warning: Warning: Memecoins are extremely volatile. You can lose all funds. No guaranteed price, liquidity, listing, or returns.
consent.declineNote: You must accept to view the alviKRON homepage. Official (binding) legal language: English.
